See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 221338 => 'Dakar', 2213393 => 'Outside Dakar', 2213394 => 'Outside Dakar', 2213395 => 'Outside Dakar', 2213396 => 'Outside Dakar', 2213397 => 'Outside Dakar', 2213398 => 'Outside Dakar', 2213399 => 'Outside Dakar', ];
